data.content: Shipment verified: global swap agent implementation is on main and pushed to origin. Commits b8a42850 (refactor: move swap UI from per-step to global) and a6f77fc2 (fix: replace all pool occurrences) are both on main with no local/remote divergence. StepPoolEditor confirmed free of swap UI. GlobalSwapAgent component at bottom of SettingsPoolsSection handles all-step replacement in one action.
